FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 17
In Nadi Astrology great importance is given to houses
l-5-9, the reason being :-
Starting from Aries where it is East, to the 5th of it is again
the East sign; and the 9th -that is 5th to 5th is East; and again 5th
to 9th -that is the I st house is the East sign.
This is the reason for considering l-5-9 as East signs., in
directional aspects, as taken from Aries.
Even if it is taken from Leo-Leo is East and Sagittarius is
the 5th sign to the Leo which is also East, in terms of
fimdamentals of Astrology.
And 9th from Leo is also East and for the above reasons
importance is given for the above directional aspects.
For another example if Ascendant is taken as Aquarius,
Gemini is the 5th sign to Aquarius, which is also the West sign.
Libra is the 9th sign to Aquarius which is also West.
The important principle of Nadi Astrology based on
directional aspects is that, all the planets posited in Zodiacal signs
